--- Page 1 --- MANUFACTURERS' AUTHORIZATION FORM Ref: IOCL/KJM/04906 Date: 16/03/2026 To AM (MAT) IOCL Haldia Refinery, INDIAN OIL CORPORATION LIMITED, Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas (Swagata Mondal) GeM Portal Ref: GeM Bid GEM/2026/B/7319588 dated 05-03-2026. Sub: MANUFACTURERS' AUTHORIZATION FORM Dear Sir/Ma’am, We M/s INP Technologies Limited, (formerly known as INP Technologies Pvt Ltd) who are established and reputable manufacturers of Desktop Computers/AIO/Thin Client/Laptop/Kiosks IT accessories having factories at C – 18, MIDC, Tarapur, Boisar, Palghar - 401506 do hereby authorize M/s KJM Group System Solutions, Shop No.31, Bldg. No.1, Ostwal Ornate, Jesal Park, Bhayandar (East), Dist : Thane - 401105. to submit a Quote/Bid, and sign the contract with you for the goods manufactured by us against the above GeM Bid. We hereby extend our full warranty post warranty support as per Conditions of Contract for the goods and services offered for supply by the above firm against this GeM Bid Document. We duly authorize the said firm to act on our behalf in fulfilling all installation, technical support and Annual maintenance obligations required by the Contract. GeM Authorization CODE - 03022026-KJM Yours faithfully, For M/s INP Technologies Limited Name: Purvi Shah Designation: AVP Address: 202, Grande Edifice, Akruli Road, Kandivali East, Mumbai – 400101. Email: purvi@inp.co.in Mobile: 9820940609 --- Page 3 --- TECHNICAL SPECIFICATIONS Date: 16/03/2026 To AM (MAT) IOCL Haldia Refinery, INDIAN OIL CORPORATION LIMITED, Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas (Swagata Mondal) GeM Portal Ref: GeM Bid GEM/2026/B/7319588 dated 05-03-2026. Number of USB Version 3.2 Gen 1 (5 Gbps) 2 YES Number of USB 2.0 or better 4 YES Number of 10 Gbps USB Type C 1 (Numbers of 5 Gbps USB Type C ports or better - 5) AS PER CORRIGENDUM YES Number of 3.2 Gen2 (10 Gbps) USB 1 YES Number of VGA Ports 1 (Number of VGA port- Optional) AS PER CORRIGENDUM YES Number of HDMI Ports (Version 2.1 or better) 1 YES Number of DP Ports (Version 1.4 or better) 1 YES --- Page 5 --- 10 Generic Headphone out Yes YES Microphone-in Yes YES Cabinet Form Factor SFF /Tower YES Monitor Stand Tilt and height adjust with flexibility YES 11 Certification BIS Registration under CRS of Meity Yes YES ROHS Compliance Yes YES EPR Yes YES 12 Input Devices Mouse Connectivity Wired YES Type of Mouse Optical Scroll YES Keyboard Connectivity Wired YES Type of Keyboard 104 Keys YES 13 Power Power Supply Min. 250 watt with 85% efficiency or better YES 14 Warranty On Site OEM Warranty (Year) 3 YES Yours faithfully, For M/s INP Technologies Limited Name: Purvi Shah Designation: AVP Address: 202, Grande Edifice, Akruli Road, Kandivali East, Mumbai – 400101. Email: purvi@inp.co.in Mobile: 9820940609 --- Page 6 --- ANNEXURE-V DECLARATION OF BLACK LISTING / HOLIDAY LISTING (TO BE SUBMITTED ON COMPANY’S LETTER HEAD) In the case of Company: We hereby declare that we are presently neither placed on any holiday list or blacklist declared by Indian Oil Corporation Ltd. Or by Ministry of Petroleum & Natural Gas (MOPNG), nor any inquiry is pending by Indian Oil Corporation Ltd. or MOPNG, in respect of corrupt or fraudulent practice(s), except as indicated below: (Here give particulars of blacklisting or holiday listing and/or inquiry and in the absence thereof state "NIL") Place: MUMBAI Signature of OEM Name of Signatory – PURVI SHAH (AVP) Date: 21/03/2026 --- Page 7 --- TO WHOMSOEVER IT MAY CONCERN Malicious Code. The seller should upload following certificate in the bid: - (a) This is to certify that the Hardware and the Software being offered, as part of the contract, does not contain Embedded Malicious code that would activate procedures to: - (i) Inhibit the desires and designed function of the equipment. (ii) Cause physical damage to the user or equipment during the exploitation. (iii) Tap information resident or transient in the equipment/network. (b) The firm will be considered to be in breach of the procurement contract, in case physical damage, loss of information or infringements related to copyright and Intellectual Property Right (IPRs) are caused due to activation of any such malicious code in embedded software. Yours faithfully, For M/s INP Technologies Limited Name: Purvi Shah Designation: AVP Address: 202, Grande Edifice, Akruli Road, Kandivali East, Mumbai – 400101. Email: purvi@inp.co.in Mobile: 9820940609 --- Page 8 --- Date: 16/03/2026 To AM (MAT) IOCL Haldia Refinery, INDIAN OIL CORPORATION LIMITED, Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas (Swagata Mondal) GeM Portal Ref: GeM Bid GEM/2026/B/7319588 dated 05-03-2026. Subject: Self Declaration for Warranty Support Dear Sir, We warrant that everything to be supplied by us shall be brand new, free from all defects and faults in material, workmanship and manufacture, and shall be of the highest grade, quality, and consistent with the established standards for materials specification, drawings or samples, if any, and shall operate properly. We shall be fully responsible for its efficient operation. We also confirm that all service-related complaints will be attended within a period of 48 working hours and will resolve the issue within Three Days at onsite. 3 YEARS warranty period, in case the equipment fails, we will provide all services to complete repairs within a week free of charge. Yours faithfully, For M/s INP Technologies Limited Name: Purvi Shah Designation: AVP Address: 202, Grande Edifice, Akruli Road, Kandivali East, Mumbai – 400101. Email: purvi@inp.co.in Mobile: 9820940609 --- Page 9 --- TO WHOMSOEVER IT MAY CONCERN Self-Declaration for Digital Product Key in BIOS. Dear Sir, We, M/s INP TECHNOLOGIES LTD (formerly known as INP Technologies Pvt Ltd), 202, Grande Edifice, Akruli Road, Kandivali East, Mumbai - 400101, who are reputed Manufacturers of Desktop Computers/ Thin clients/AIO/Kiosks and other IT equipment, do hereby declare that the Digital Product key will be injected in BIOS Yours faithfully, For M/s INP Technologies Limited Name: Purvi Shah Designation: AVP Address: 202, Grande Edifice, Akruli Road, Kandivali East, Mumbai – 400101. Email: purvi@inp.co.in Mobile: 9820940609 --- Page 10 --- TO WHOMSOEVER IT MAY CONCERN Self-Declaration for Factory Preloaded OS. Dear Sir, We, M/s INP TECHNOLOGIES LTD (formerly known as INP Technologies Pvt Ltd) 202, Grande Edifice, Akruli Road, Kandivali East, Mumbai - 400101, who are reputed Manufacturers of Desktop Computers/ Thin clients/AIO/Kiosks and other IT equipment, do hereby confirm and undertake that the Genuine MS windows OS will be preloaded at our Factory Premises only. Yours faithfully, For M/s INP Technologies Limited Name: Purvi Shah Designation: AVP Address: 202, Grande Edifice, Akruli Road, Kandivali East, Mumbai – 400101. Email: purvi@inp.co.in Mobile: 9820940609 --- Page 11 --- TO WHOMSOEVER IT MAY CONCERN Self-Declaration of Non-Obsolete-EOL Products. Dear Sir, We, M/s INP TECHNOLOGIES LTD, 202, Grande Edifice, Akruli Road, Kandivali East, Mumbai - 400101, who are reputed Manufacturers of Desktop Computers/ Thin clients/AIO/Kiosks and other IT equipment, do hereby undertake that the products quoted are non - obsolete in the market and has residual market life for at least 7 years. Yours faithfully, For M/s INP Technologies Limited Name: Purvi Shah Designation: AVP Address: 202, Grande Edifice, Akruli Road, Kandivali East, Mumbai – 400101. Email: purvi@inp.co.in Mobile: 9820940609 --- Page 12 --- TO WHOMSOEVER IT MAY CONCERN Self-Declaration of Same Make OEM. Dear Sir, We, M/s INP TECHNOLOGIES LTD (formerly known as INP Technologies Pvt Ltd), 202, Grande Edifice, Akruli Road, Kandivali East, Mumbai - 400101, who are reputed Manufacturers of Desktop Computers/ Thin clients/AIO/Kiosks and other IT equipment, do hereby declare that the Monitor, Keyboard & Mouse will be from the same OEM i.e. INP. Yours faithfully, For M/s INP Technologies Limited Name: Purvi Shah Designation: AVP Address: 202, Grande Edifice, Akruli Road, Kandivali East, Mumbai – 400101.
